channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.description: A couple of months ago we finished exposing our SaaS through an MCP server. It now has 118 tools across 12 domains. I want to show what an AI actually does with all of that, because it's not...

item.title: 5 Wikipedia Tables That Break Most Scrapers (And How to Fix Them)
item.description: Wikipedia is the most common source for web table data. It's also a minefield of edge cases that break naive scrapers. I've collected the five patterns that cause the most issues while building...

item.title: It’s amazing how good Alienware’s $350 OLED monitor is

item.description: Yesterday Microsoft announced some surprising news: at a time when everything in gaming is getting more expensive, Xbox Game Pass Ultimate was actually getting a price cut. Going forward, the...

item.title: AI is spitting out more potential drugs than ever. This start-up wants to figure out which ones matter.
item.description: 10x Science has raised a $4.8 million seed round to help pharmaceutical researchers understand complex molecules.

item.title: The most interesting startups showcased at Google Cloud Next 2026
item.description: Google wants AI startups on its cloud and has showcased a long list of them at its annual conference.

item.title: Google Maps is about to get a big dose of AI
item.description: Generative AI is being infused into Google's popular feature within Maps.

item.title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multi-billion-dollar deal
item.description: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

item.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
item.description: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.

item.title: ICE Uses Graphite Spyware
item.description: ICE has admitted that it uses spyware from the Israeli company Graphite.

item.title: Lotus Wiper Malware Targets Venezuelan Energy Systems in Destructive Attack
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a previously undocumented data wiper that has been used in attacks targeting Venezuela at the end of last year and the start of 2026. Dubbed Lotus Wiper,...

item.description: On January 31, 2026, researchers disclosed that Moltbook, a social network built for AI agents, had left its database wide open, exposing 35,000 email addresses and 1.5 million agent API tokens...

item.title: One town’s scheme to get rid of its geese

item.title: There is no nature anymore
item.description: When people talk about “nature,” they’re generally talking about things that aren’t made by human beings. Rocks. Reefs. Red wolves. But while there is plenty of God’s creation to go around, it is...

item.title: Anker made its own chip to bring AI to all its products
